title: microlicia regeliana
intro: Microlicia regeliana, also known as the 'Pride of Brazil', is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Microlicia regeliana include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Microlicia regeliana is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits.
